---
title: "lightning_rod.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/lightning_rod.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.27
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.43
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignHUD, box_top. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_bottom`
- `optimize_file`
